arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal and Aston Villa could rival Liverpool for £50m midfielder
arts.sum: Liverpool could face competition from five other Premier League clubs for the signature of Brazilian midfielder Ederson, according to reports. The Reds have been heavily linked with Ederson in recent months but failed to sign a defensive midfielder over the summer, also missing out on Spain international Martin Zubimendi. arts.ttl: Man Utd confirm deal for highly-rated youngster after Arsenal exit
arts.sum: United's academy director Nick Cox said : "We welcome Samuel Lusale, Chido Obi-Martin and James Overy to the club. United have now confirmed the teenager has been added to the club's group of first-year scholars alongside winger Samuel Lusale and right-back James Overy, both 17, who signed from Perth Glory and Crystal Palace respectively.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes sends defiant message to Man Utd fans after consecutive red cards
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes has thanked Manchester United fans for their support in what he described as "one of the hardest" moments of his career following two red cards in consecutive games. He wrote: "Tough moment as a team and personally for me, one of the hardest.
